creator: tmclaugh@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
Seems the original description got munged...

security/openssh (the pure OpenBSD version of OpenSSH) is 4.5 years out of
date and vulnerable as noted in the vuxml DB and on the OpenBSD security
page.  It is owned by ports@ and since it is not being actively maintained
and we have security/openssh-portable there is little reason to keep this
port around.  I passed this by simon@ on IRC and he agreed as well.
